_doc: Dataset subset + event-anchor spec (refine-logs/EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md Phase 0.3/0.4). Do NOT rebuild a Foley benchmark; use FoleyBench (Dixit et al., 2025, arXiv:2511.13219) or equivalent. No dataset is downloaded by audit-only code; foley_cw/dataset.py builds the MANIFEST + a tiny synthetic dataset for CI. Real ingestion reads FoleyBench metadata when present (path below).
class_balance: balance coarse event classes; report per-class n
